overall.description: A ship simulation game showing a first-person view from the vessel's bridge at night. The camera looks forward over the bow while navigation displays (chart, radar, and sonar) are visible overhead. The vessel moves steadily through dark waters until a lightning flash illuminates the scene briefly.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigation station over open water

agents.ego_description: operating the vessel from the bridge, monitoring the radar and navigation displays while maintaining course through open water

entered.detail: navigation chart showing colored depth contours with red restricted areas and yellow landmasses
circular radar display with sweeping yellow beam showing surrounding contacts and range rings
blue sonar display showing water column and seabed depth profile
red and white painted bow structure with safety railings and deck equipment
metal safety railing along the port side of the forecastle
metal safety railing along the starboard side of the forecastle
dark choppy ocean surface extending to the horizon under night sky

segments.scene_description: The view from the ship's bridge shows the vessel moving steadily through dark waters at night. The three navigation monitors display chart data, rotating radar, and sonar depth readings overhead. The bow cuts through the water as the vessel maintains its course through the open ocean.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigation station over open water

events.description: bright lightning flash illuminates the port side horizon and ocean surface

agents.ego_description: continuing to operate the vessel through the stormy conditions as lightning strikes nearby

entered.detail: bright white lightning strike visible on the port side horizon briefly illuminating the water

segments.scene_description: The vessel continues its course through the night as a sudden lightning flash appears on the port side, briefly illuminating the ocean surface and sky before fading back to darkness. The navigation displays remain active as the ship maintains its heading through the storm.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a ship's bridge as a steady nocturnal voyage is briefly interrupted by a flash of atmospheric light. It begins with the vessel cutting through dark, open waters, while navigation monitors displaying chart data, rotating radar, and sonar readings remain visible overhead. As the ship maintains its course through the gloom, a sudden lightning flash erupts on the port side, momentarily illuminating the ocean surface and the sky. The scene then shifts back into deep darkness as the light fades, leaving the active displays to guide the vessel forward through the storm.
